items.title: Middle East war de-escalation rhetoric drove a sharp reversal in crude and a risk-on bounce
items.summary: Reuters reported oil sank 7% after Trump said the war could be over soon; Reuters also reported Asian stocks rebounded as oil fell, while Iran still said it would decide when the war ends and would keep blocking the Strait of Hormuz

items.title: Macro de-escalation signal around the Iran war is easing immediate oil/inflation stress; broad risk sentiment improved. No validated single-name thesis changer found across David's watchlist in this scan
